allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
merge: incorporate SOMS upstream improvements into HEMS fork

Merge SOMS main branch into hems-main, selectively adopting upstream
features and fixes while preserving all HEMS-specific functionality.

Adopted from SOMS:
- Guard 4 title similarity check for create_task deduplication
- actionable_reports for task_report follow-up handling
- Humidity suppression keywords in alert system
- expires_in_minutes task-type-aware expiry logic
- get_device_status / get_active_tasks tools
- Full DeviceRegistry \(utility score, adaptive timeout, device tree\)
- Per-sensor-type SensorFusion \(half-life, reliability weighting\)
- Event store: async lock, per-channel stats, source_device column
- MCP bridge: thread-safe response handling, error propagation
- Sanitizer: device allowlist, temperature/pump safety limits
- System prompt: task_report handling, device network management guide
- is_stuffy / thermal_comfort properties on EnvironmentData
- Dashboard client: get_task_stats\(\), better session management

Preserved HEMS-specific:
- YAML character system with hot-reload
- Plugin TTS \(espeak, VOICEVOX, Edge TTS\)
- OpenClaw / Obsidian integration
- SQLite default \(dual DDL\)
- Rule engine GPU fallback
- xp_reward vocabulary \(not bounty\)
- HEMS port offsets and container naming

Excluded SOMS-only components \(intentionally removed in HEMS fork\):
- services/wallet/, services/wallet-app/ \(replaced by XP points\)
- services/perception/ \(deferred to Phase 4\)
- services/dashboard/ \(restructured to services/backend + frontend\)
- wallet_bridge, rejection_stock, currency_unit_stock, voicevox_client

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
